template_tokens.ANDROID_PACKAGE_NAME: Environment-specific Android package name supplied by the NHS App team
template_tokens.ANDROID_SHA256_CERT_FINGERPRINT: Environment-specific Android certificate fingerprint supplied by the NHS App team
template_tokens.IOS_APP_ID: Environment-specific iOS appID supplied by the NHS App team
template_tokens.IOS_PATHS_ALLOWLIST: Expanded from the approved route path allowlist for the selected environment

guardrails: No real package IDs, fingerprints, or appIDs are stored in repo outputs.
No wildcard route registration is allowed.
No PHI-bearing query parameters may appear in registered paths.
Placeholder files do not prove production hosting readiness.
